nietzschean_angle: Fatigue is real, but turning a temporary condition into a whole philosophy of surrender is exactly the trap.
plain_explanation: Nietzsche would distinguish being tired from making tiredness into a permanent law of life.
sharp_reply_style: Being tired is a condition. Turning fatigue into a philosophy is surrender.
card_text:
Theme: self-overcoming
User example: I am tired of trying.
User patterns: tired of trying, too tired, done trying, no energy to push
Nietzschean angle: Fatigue is real, but turning a temporary condition into a whole philosophy of surrender is exactly the trap.
Plain explanation: Nietzsche would distinguish being tired from making tiredness into a permanent law of life.
Sharp reply style: Being tired is a condition. Turning fatigue into a philosophy is surrender.
Primary references: Thus Spoke Zarathustra - Three Metamorphoses, The Gay Science
Source IDs: bge_225_discipline_of_suffering, zarathustra_prologue_last_man
Tags: fatigue, self-overcoming, discipline, becoming
